channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DMR] DMR Engineering Reappoints Rachana Agrawal as Director
item.description:
DMR Engineering Ltd has re-appointed Mrs. Rachana Agrawal as a Non-Executive Independent Director for a term of five years, effective from September 30, 2026, to September 29, 2031. This decision, based on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee, was approved by the Board of Directors on May 16, 2026, and is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. Mrs. Agrawal is a Fellow Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India with over 32 years of experience in finance, management, and corporate governance.

  • Rachana Agrawal re-appointed as Non-Executive Independent Director.
  • Term is for five years, starting September 30, 2026.
  • Re-appointment subject to shareholder approval at AGM.
  • Agrawal has 32+ years of experience in finance and governance.
  • She chairs key committees within DMR Engineering Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DMR Hydroengineering & Infrastructures Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [YASHHV] Yash Highvoltage: Unmodified Audit Opinion for FY26
item.description:
Yash Highvoltage Ltd. has declared that their statutory auditor, M/s. Shah Mehta & Bakshi, Chartered Accountants, issued an audit report with an unmodified opinion on the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026. This declaration, made by CFO Sumit Poddar, complies with Regulation 33(3)(d) of the SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

  • Auditor M/s. Shah Mehta & Bakshi issued an unmodified audit opinion.
  • Opinion covers standalone & consolidated results for FY26.
  • Declaration complies with SEBI LODR Regulation 33(3)(d).
  • Sumit Poddar, CFO, made the declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Yash Highvoltage Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [GUJINTRX] Gujarat Intrux Board Meeting on May 29, 2026
item.description:
Gujarat Intrux Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 29, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also discuss the recommendation of a final dividend for the financial year 2025-26. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities is closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the meeting concludes.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 29, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Discussion on final dividend for FY 2025-26 is on the agenda.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GUJARAT INTRUX LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ICON] Icon Facilitators Board Meeting on May 25, 2026
item.description:
Icon Facilitators Ltd has scheduled a meeting of its Board of Directors on May 25, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results of the company for the half year/year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 25, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results for FY26.
  • Notice pursuant to Regulation 29 of SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Icon Facilitators Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CONTILI] Contil India Board Meeting Scheduled for May 28, 2026
item.description:
Contil India Ltd has announced that a meeting of its Board of Directors is scheduled for May 28, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed for directors, officers, and designated employees from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the results.

  • Contil India's board will meet on May 28, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • The results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CONTIL INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VLEGOV] VL E-Governance Board Meeting on 21 May 2026
item.description:
VL E-Governance & IT Solutions Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 21, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 21, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited standalone financial results.
  • Results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VL E-Governance & IT Solutions Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SEAMECLTD] Seamec Princess Charter Delayed Due to Bad Weather
item.description:
Seamec Ltd informs that the charter hire of its vessel 'SEAMEC PRINCESS' with M/s. Lamprell Energy Limited, intended for ONGC jobs in the West field, will not commence this season due to adverse weather conditions. This information was received on May 17, 2026, at 08:09 hours.

  • Seamec Princess charter hire delayed.
  • Delay due to bad weather conditions.
  • Charter was for ONGC jobs via Lamprell Energy.
  • Delay impacts West field operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SEAMEC LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [TRIGYN] Trigyn Technologies Board Meeting on May 22, 2026
item.description:
Trigyn Technologies Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 22, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed for designated persons from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 22, 2026 to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of standalone and consolidated results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026 until 48 hours post results declaration.
  • Meeting pursuant to Regulation 29(1)(a) of SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRIGYN TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHILINDORE] Sayaji Hotels Appoints Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27
item.description:
Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Ltd has appointed M/s Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP as the Internal Auditor for the Indore Unit and M/s Abhinav Khandelwal & Associates, Chartered Accountants as the Internal Auditor for the Corporate and Altara Unit for the financial year 2026-27. The appointments were approved by the Board of Directors based on the recommendations of the Audit Committee at its meeting held on May 16, 2026.

  • Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP appointed as Internal Auditor for Indore Unit.
  • Abhinav Khandelwal & Associates appointed for Corporate and Altara Unit.
  • Appointments approved by the Board on May 16, 2026.
  • Appointments are for the Financial Year 2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [CFEL] Confidence Futuristic Energetech: FY26 Audited Results Approved
item.description:
Confidence Futuristic Energetech Ltd's board approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also recommended a final dividend of 5% (₹0.25 per equity share), subject to shareholder approval. The audit report has an unmodified opinion. The meeting commenced at 04:00 PM and concluded at 22:55 PM on May 16, 2026.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • Final dividend of 5% (₹0.25 per share) recommended.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.
  • Meeting concluded on May 16, 2026 at 22:55 PM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Confidence Futuristic Energetech Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
